## What tool?

- **Name:**
- **Type:** AI Model / Agent / Other
- **Website:**
- **GitHub (if open source):**
- **Company / Developer:**

## Quick description

A one-line summary of what it does.

## Why should it be included?

Anything notable (popularity, unique features, recent release, etc.)

## Tags

Suggested tags from `src/data/tags.ts` (e.g. Chat, Image, Coding, Open Source, Free, API)
